title: Le consonanti trappola
pronunciation_features_introduced: tapped r (not English retroflex or French uvular)
hard /k/ and /ɡ/ before e/i via ch and gh spelling
doppie consonanti (geminate length distinction) with meaning-changing minimal pairs
notes: Second A1 pronunciation lesson. Builds on 001-vocali. Every Italian example is ≥3 chars so all examples are drill-eligible. Doppie consonanti section uses minimal pairs to demonstrate meaning-changing gemination.
